message:
feat(analytics): add wizard analytics tracking to os-selection page

Integrate useWizardAnalytics hook into the OS selection wizard step
for comprehensive funnel tracking.

apps/web/app/wizard/os-selection/page.tsx:

New import:
- useWizardAnalytics from @/lib/hooks/useWizardAnalytics

Hook configuration:
- step: "os_selection" (event identifier)
- stepNumber: 1 (first wizard step)
- stepTitle: "OS Selection" (human-readable name)

Analytics integration:
- Call markComplete() before markStepComplete()
- Pass { selected_os: selectedOS } as event properties
- Tracks which OS the user selected (mac/windows)
- Added markComplete to useCallback dependencies

This enables tracking of:
- Step 1 completion rate in the wizard funnel
- OS distribution of users completing setup
- Time spent on OS selection step
- Drop-off analysis at the first decision point

The os-selection page is particularly important for analytics as
it's the entry point to the wizard and captures the user's platform,
which affects subsequent instructions throughout the setup flow.
